examples: But, unfortunately, we are carried away by sensate values.
Objective to provide anatomy basis for a free latissimus dorsal muscular flap with the sensate nerve.
We create a society essentially based on sensate value, on worldliness, which necessitates the foxhole.
The Riding Part: Sheri teaches herd dynamics, communicating with horses, horses as working animals, horses (and us) as sensate beings in a sensate world, horse heartbeats, grooming and tacking up.
